title: Crispy Vietnamese Lamb Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and gluten-free stir fry recipe featuring lamb and crispy vegetables.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the lamb and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Remove the lamb from the skillet and set aside.
In the same skillet, add the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the green onions and cook until they start to soften, about 2 minutes.
Add the stir fry sauce and cook for 1-2 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Return the lamb to the skillet and stir to combine with the sauce.
Transfer the lamb and sauce mixture to a serving platter.
Garnish with crispy vegetable garnish, chopped cilantro, and serve immediately.

To make the crispy vegetable garnish, heat a small amount of oil in a pan over medium heat. Add the desired vegetables (such as carrots, bell peppers, or zucchini) and cook until crispy. Season with salt to taste.
